name: Freeport Resources Inc.
summary: Freeport Resources Inc., a junior mineral exploration company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in Newfoundland and Labrador and British Columbia, Canada. The company explores for a portfolio of garnet, molybdenum, silver, copper, fluorite, gold, and tungsten properties. Its projects include the Hutton Garnet Beaches that consists of 113 claims covering an area of 28 square kilometer located in Labrador; the Red Rose Mine project situated in British Columbia; Spanish Mountain Gold project, which consist of 6 units covering an area of 150 hectares located in British Columbia; and Q projects that consists 48 units covering an area of 12 square kilometer situated in British Columbia. Freeport Resources Inc. was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
